introSection: Dinosaur valley is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Wicksteed Park in Kettering, Northamptonshire, England, UK. The coaster opened at the park for the 1992 season. It was known as Roller Coaster up to the 2020 season, being renamed in 2021.
fullText:
Dinosaur valley is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Wicksteed Park in Kettering, Northamptonshire, England, UK. The coaster opened at the park for the 1992 season. It was known as Roller Coaster up to the 2020 season, being renamed in 2021.



Blue track and green supports.



Courtesy of Stevie Gould
